config.script:
'kantor #include "50523" 'rabaty #include "50524" 'srvDate #include "50126" 'HARUI_PRICE #include "50101" class RapParamCustom Private m_strXMLPart Private m_strVBPart Private m_strFopenPart Private m_strParamName Private m_strBindExpr Private m_nMode Private m_bCena1 Private m_strCena1 Private m_bCena2 Private m_strCena2 Private m_bCena3 Private m_strCena3 Private m_bCena4 Private m_strCena4 Private m_bCena5 Private m_strCena5 Private m_bCena6 Private m_strCena6 Private m_nNettoBrutto Private m_pWaluta Private m_bPrzelicz Private m_bDlaKlienta private m_pKlient Private m_pAfc Private m_bAllowNone Public Property Get przelicz() przelicz = m_bPrzelicz = "1" End Property Public Property Get dla_klienta() dla_klienta = m_bDlaKlienta = "1" End Property Public function get_kurs(byval idWalSource) dim pWalutaSource:set pWalutaSource = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA , idWalSource) dim curKurs dim res: res = kantor (1, pWalutaSource , m_pWaluta , srvDate , N5KURSWALUT_SPRZEDAZY , curKurs) if res then get_kurs = ccur(curKurs) else trans_.message 7000, 0, "nie udało się obliczyć kursu ("+ pWalutaSource.strNazwa+" na "+ m_pWaluta.strNazwa +") - wstawiam 0.0000" get_kurs = ccur(0.0) end if end function Public function get_cena(byval pRec , byval strField , byval n , bResInNetto) dim curValue dim pProdukt dim pOpak dim curDummy if dla_klienta and not m_pKlient is nothing then set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT , clng(pRec("c_prod_idobj"))) set pOpak = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(clng(pRec("lp"))) if nx_compute_price(m_pKlient, pProdukt, pOpak, trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY),1.00, n, _ nothing, bResInNetto, curDummy, curValue) then get_cena = curValue end if else get_cena = pRec(strField) end if end function Public function przelicz_wal(byval pRec , byval strField, byval curKurs , byval n , bResInNetto) dim curValue dim pProdukt dim pOpak dim curDummy if dla_klienta and not m_pKlient is nothing then set pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT , clng(pRec("c_prod_idobj"))) set pOpak = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(clng(pRec("lp"))) if nx_compute_price(m_pKlient, pProdukt, pOpak, trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY),1.00, n, _ nothing, bResInNetto, curDummy, curValue) then przelicz_wal = curValue end if else przelicz_wal = pRec(strField) end if przelicz_wal = przelicz_walute(przelicz_wal,curKurs) end function Public Property Let cena1(ByVal strCena1 ) if strCena1 <> "" then if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_1) then m_bCena1 = "0" else m_bCena1 = "1" end if else m_bCena1 = "0" end if m_strCena1 = strCena1 End Property Public Property Get bCena1() bCena1 = m_bCena1 = "1" End Property Public Property Get strCena1() strCena1 = m_strCena1 End Property Public Property Let cena2(ByVal strCena2 ) if strCena2 <> "" then if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_2) then m_bCena2 = "0" else m_bCena2 = "1" end if else m_bCena2 = "0" end if m_strCena2 = strCena2 End Property Public Property Get bCena2() bCena2 = m_bCena2 = "1" End Property Public Property Get strCena2() strCena2 = m_strCena2 End Property Public Property Let cena3(ByVal strCena3 ) if strCena3 <> "" then if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_3) then m_bCena3 = "0" else m_bCena3 = "1" end if else m_bCena3 = "0" end if m_strCena3 = strCena3 End Property Public Property Get bCena3() bCena3 = m_bCena3 = "1" End Property Public Property Get strCena3() strCena3 = m_strCena3 End Property Public Property Let cena4(ByVal strCena4 ) if strCena4 <> "" then if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_4) then m_bCena4 = "0" else m_bCena4 = "1" end if else m_bCena4 = "0" end if m_strCena4 = strCena4 End Property Public Property Get bCena4() bCena4 = m_bCena4 = "1" End Property Public Property Get strCena4() strCena4 = m_strCena4 End Property Public Property Let cena5(ByVal strCena5 ) if strCena5 <> "" then if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_5) then m_bCena5 = "0" else m_bCena5 = "1" end if else m_bCena5 = "0" end if m_strCena5 = strCena5 End Property Public Property Get bCena5() bCena5 = m_bCena5 = "1" End Property Public Property Get strCena5() strCena5 = m_strCena5 End Property Public Property Let cena6(ByVal strCena6 ) if strCena6 <> "" then if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_6) then m_bCena6 = "0" else m_bCena6 = "1" end if else m_bCena6 = "0" end if m_strCena6 = strCena6 End Property Public Property Get bCena6() bCena6 = m_bCena6 = "1" End Property Public Property Get strCena6() strCena6 = m_strCena6 End Property Private Sub initialize() m_nMode = MODE_ASK m_strXMLPart = "" m_strVBPart = "" m_strBindExpr = "" m_strFopenPart = "" m_nNettoBrutto = clng(2) m_bAllowNone = False set m_pKlient = nothing End Sub Public Function allow_none() m_bAllowNone = True End Function Public Property Let ParamName(ByVal vData ) m_strParamName = vData End Property Public Property Get ParamName() ParamName = m_strParamName End Property Public Property Let nettobrutto(ByVal vData ) m_nNettoBrutto = vData End Property Public Property Get nettobrutto() nettobrutto = m_nNettoBrutto End Property Public Property Let mode(ByVal nMode ) m_nMode = nMode End Property Public Property Get mode() mode = m_nMode End Property Public Property Get waluta() set waluta = m_pWaluta End Property Public Property Get klient() set klient = m_pKlient End Property Public Function Bind(ByVal strTableName , ByVal strFieldName ) m_strBindExpr = strTableName + "." + strFieldName Set Bind = Me End Function Public Function BindExpr(ByVal strBindExpr ) m_strBindExpr = strBindExpr Set BindExpr = Me End Function Public Function get_bindexpr() get_bindexpr = m_strBindExpr End Function Public Function get_xml_part(ByVal nParamNr , ByRef pRPDB ) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 m_strXMLPart = vbCrLf + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf dim bCheckBox1 : bCheckBox1 = false dim bCheckBox2 : bCheckBox2 = false dim bCheckBox3 : bCheckBox3 = false dim bCheckBox4 : bCheckBox4 = false dim bCheckBox5 : bCheckBox5 = false dim bCheckBox6 : bCheckBox6 = false dim strCena1, strCena2, strCena3, strCena4, strCena5, strCena6 check_hide_price bCheckBox1, bCheckBox2, bCheckBox3, bCheckBox4, bCheckBox5, bCheckBox6 if bCheckBox1 then strCena1 = "
Cena 1
"+ vbCrLf else strCena1 = "
Cena 1

"+ vbCrLf end if if bCheckBox2 then strCena2 = "
Cena 2
"+ vbCrLf else strCena2 = "
Cena 2

"+ vbCrLf end if if bCheckBox3 then strCena3 = "
Cena 3
"+ vbCrLf else strCena3 = "
Cena 3

"+ vbCrLf end if if bCheckBox4 then strCena4 = "
Cena 4
"+ vbCrLf else strCena4 = "
Cena 4

"+ vbCrLf end if if bCheckBox5 then strCena5 = "
Cena 5
"+ vbCrLf else strCena5 = "
Cena 5

"+ vbCrLf end if if bCheckBox6 then strCena6 = "
Cena 6
"+ vbCrLf else strCena6 = "
Cena 6

"+ vbCrLf end if m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + vbCrLf + _ "
"+ vbCrLf +_ strCena1 + strCena2 + strCena3 + strCena4 + strCena5 + strCena6 +_ "Wyświetlane cenynettobrutto
"+ vbCrLf + _ "
Przeliczaj na walute

"+ vbCrLf + _ "
Dla klienta

"+ vbCrLf + _ ""+ vbCrLf + _ ""+ vbCrLf + _ ""+ vbCrLf + _ ""+ vbCrLf + _ ""+ vbCrLf + _ + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf get_xml_part = m_strXMLPart End Function public sub check_hide_price(byref bCheckBox1, byref bCheckBox2, byref bCheckBox3, byref bCheckBox4, byref bCheckBox5, byref bCheckBox6) if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_1) then bCheckBox1 = true end if if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_2) then bCheckBox2 = true end if if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_3) then bCheckBox3 = true end if if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_4) then bCheckBox4 = true end if if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_5) then bCheckBox5 = true end if if HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_6) then bCheckBox6 = true end if end sub Public Function get_vb_part(ByVal nParamNr , ByRef pRPDB ) m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ "dim g_pWaluta:set g_pWaluta = doc_.getmodule(60182).WalutaFirmy "+ vbCrLf + _ "dim g_pKlient:set g_pKlient = nothing "+ vbCrLf + _ + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ "function check" + CStr(nParamNr) + vbCrLf + _ " check" + CStr(nParamNr) + " = true" + vbCrLf + _ "end function " m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function init" + CStr(nParamNr) + vbCrLf + _ " 'aaaaa" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 1) + ").value=""" + cstr(m_bcena1)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 2) + ").text=""" + cstr(strcena1)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 3) + ").value=""" + cstr(m_bcena2)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 4) + ").text=""" + cstr(strcena2)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 5) + ").value=""" + cstr(m_bcena3)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 6) + ").text=""" + cstr(strcena3)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 7) + ").value=""" + cstr(m_bcena4)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 8) + ").text=""" + cstr(strcena4)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 9) + ").value=""" + cstr(m_bcena5)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 10) + ").text=""" + cstr(strcena5)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 11) + ").value=""" + cstr(m_bcena6)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 12) + ").text=""" + cstr(strcena6)+ """" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 13) + ").value=clng(" + cstr(m_nNettoBrutto) + ")" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 15) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 15) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf + _ " if not g_pWaluta is nothing then "+ vbCrLf + _ " oCtrl.text = g_pWaluta.strSkrot "+ vbCrLf + _ " end if"+ vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 17) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(nParamNr *1000 + 17) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf + _ " if not g_pKlient is nothing then "+ vbCrLf + _ " oCtrl.text = g_pKlient.text "+ vbCrLf + _ " end if"+ vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function choose_waluta" + vbCrLf + _ " dim id:id = doc_.getmodule(43001).do_choice_list(TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA,""Waluta"",""strNazwa"",""eTyp=N5JEDNOSTKA_WALUTA"","""","""", nothing)"+ vbCrLf + _ " if id > 0 then "+ vbCrLf + _ " set g_pWaluta = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA , id)"+ vbCrLf + _ " end if"+ vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function choose_klient" + vbCrLf + _ " dim id:id = doc_.getmodule(43001).do_choice_list(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,""Klient"",""strNazwa"","""","""","""", nothing)"+ vbCrLf + _ " if id > 0 then "+ vbCrLf + _ " set g_pklient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT , id)"+ vbCrLf + _ " end if"+ vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function waluta" + vbCrLf + _ " set waluta = g_pWaluta"+ vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function klient" + vbCrLf + _ " set klient = g_pKlient"+ vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf get_vb_part = m_strVBPart End Function Public Function get_desc() get_desc = "" End Function ' instrukcje inicjujące stany kontrolek - do fopen Public Function get_vb_init_ctrls_part(ByVal nParamNr , ByRef pRPDB ) m_strFopenPart = "init" + CStr(nParamNr) + "()" + vbCrLf get_vb_init_ctrls_part = m_strFopenPart End Function Public Function get_where_part(ByRef pTransaction) get_where_part = "" End Function Public Function is_complete() is_complete = false End Function Public Function is_valid(ByRef strMessage ) is_valid = true End Function Public Function Update(ByVal nParamNr , ByVal page ) m_bCena1 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 1).value m_strCena1 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 2).text m_bCena2 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 3).value m_strCena2 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 4).text m_bCena3 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 5).value m_strCena3 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 6).text m_bCena4 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 7).value m_strCena4 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 8).text m_bCena5 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 9).value m_strCena5 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 10).text m_bCena6 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 11).value m_strCena6 = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 12).text m_nNettoBrutto = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 13).value m_bPrzelicz = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 14).value m_bDlaKlienta = page.ctrl(nParamNr * 1000 + 16).value set m_pWaluta = page.waluta() set m_pKlient = page.klient() End Function Public Function get_desc_from_page(ByVal nParamNr , ByVal page ) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 get_desc_from_page = "" End Function Public Function paramtype() paramtype = -1 End Function end class function new_custom(byval strParamName) Set new_custom = New RapParamCustom new_custom.ParamName = strParamName end function
